title: Chapter 2
content:
Chapter 2: Chapter 2: Welcome to the MILF VILLAGE, Host!

"Urgh... what happened?" Owen muttered as he inspected his body as the sudden occurance was not something he’d expected.

For some unknown reason, there were no visible changes; everything looked exactly the same but that sense of familiarity ended the moment he looked around...his surroundings were completely different from his bedroom!

The interior featured a simple wooden floor and cozy, light-wood materials for the walls.

There was a large, rectangular window letting in the sun light. A simple wooden bed with a crisp white mattress sat in the corner, alongside a table cluttered with books and various other items.

Although the room was simple, a warm, cozy aesthetic dominated the entire space, a home...not a house in Owen’s standards.

"Where am I?..." Owen questioned himself. It felt like a truly dumb question, yet it was a completely normal reaction to such a crazy event.

What kind of magic had just taken place? He clearly recalled his body getting sucked into the monitor, and then "poof" he was here.

He didn’t even scream because it was so sudden... a freak abnormal phenomenon that happened to him while he just wanted to play and finish the game.

He was totally ignorant of how it had happened, but he didn’t have to wait long for answers.

A crisp sound suddenly echoed in his ears as a glowing blue screen appeared right in front of his face.

Ding!!!

[Welcome to the MILF VILLAGE, Host!]

[Tame All The MILFS And Make Them Your Loyal Devotees!]

[ After Conquering All The MILFS, You Can Return Home And Bring Them Together With You! ]

Ding! Ding! Ding!

[MILF SYSTEM!]

Host: Owen Dicke

Age: 23 years old

Level: 1 (0/34)

MILF Token: 0

Skills:

Golden Fingers (SSS Rank)

Smooth Talker (SSS Rank)

MILF Tamer! (SSS+ Rank)

Divine Cock! (SSS+ Rank)

Shop: [ Locked...reach level 10 to unlocked!]

Tamed Milf: None

Owen stared at the wild information popping up in front of him. His mind went into overdrive trying to process it all, but he quickly arrived at only one conclusion.

He had just transmigrated into the very game he had been dying to finish, and he had completely replaced the main character!

Having read countless web novels about transmigration, he wasn’t totally clueless about the concept...but experiencing it firsthand was entirely out of this world.

It’s like a meteor of luck hit him that he got lucky for the first time in ages...well he is lucky that he got sucked to the very game he wanted to finish playing.

"Hehe... then I’m incredibly lucky." Owen celebrated internally...

Not only had he entered the game he wanted to beat so badly, but he had also become the overpowered main character as he looked at the crazy SSS+ Rank of the exclusive skills in his arnesal.

He had honestly thought he would die a virgin, but he never expected to be granted such a divine opportunity...and that divine opportunity is to f*CK MILFS...not just your normal standard MILFS but heavenly busty ones.

Knock... knock...

His wild thoughts were suddenly cut short by the sound of someone knocking on the door.

A sudden wave of panic washed over him. He had absolutely no idea how to explain his presence here, especially now that the original "main character" the man that’s supposed to play the role was gone.

Creak...click

The door swung open, and Owen quickly stood up.

He decided he would just act to the best of his abilities, no matter what happened next.

"Oh my... I’ve already called you countless times, my dear Wen. Let’s go eat now."

A busty woman standing 5’7" tall, wearing a simple dress covered by a white kitchen apron, spoke to him.

Her body was an absolute banger, even while hidden beneath the fabric of her dress. Her plump tits bounced slightly as she spoke, and she possessed the kind of dangerous curves that could make a man stay hard for as long as he could last just by looking at her.

There was barely any need to mention her face because mere words weren’t enough to describe it; the sight of her black, raven hair cascading down her shoulders alone was a total knockout.

Gulp.

Owen gulped hard, forcefully trying to restrict his "divine asset."

It was already bulging fiercely, turning into a rigid metal rod that almost reached down toward his knees.

Even with a single glance, anyone would notice the massive bulge...honestly, calling it a pole was a much more accurate than a metal rod!

"Oh my... my son really has grown into a fine man." The woman simply covered her mouth with a soft smile as her eyes drifted down to the prominent bulge...as a mom, she knows that kind of thing to her child.

Especially to Owen that’s her only child...her boy.

"...." Owen couldn’t even process a single word his "mom." had just spoken!

Yes! This gorgeous, busty MILF was supposedly the protagonist’s mother!

What shocked him to his very core was that she had just called him her son, when it was perfectly obvious to him that he wasn’t related to her at all.

"Oh my... just follow me out, okay? I will go prepare the food now before it turns cold," his mother said.

She turned her body, putting her voluptuous ass on full display as she moved away.

Before she fully closed the door, she took one last, deep peek at her son...focusing heavily on his lower body!

Creak... click.

The door finally closed, leaving Owen standing alone, still completely unable to process the situation.

"Hell, what just happened... She really called me her son..." Owen shifted his lower body, adjusting his pants since it was incredibly uncomfortable to position his massive pole like that.

He wanted nothing more than to just open it up and let everything stretch out fully, but he decided to refrain. It was definitely best to show some restraint for the time being.

Ding!!

[You are the son host, and Arielle is your mom (???).]
